name: integration-testimonial
title: Integration Testimonial
description: A two-column section pairing a customer quote with a grid of integration logo cards, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: A customer quote beside a grid of integration logo cards.

sampleContent.heading: Integrate with your favorite tools
sampleContent.subtext: Connect seamlessly with the platforms and services that power your workflow.
sampleContent.quote: We had everything talking to our warehouse, billing, and Slack in a single afternoon — the integrations just worked.
sampleContent.author: Jordan Lee
